text.title: Diff-Coverage Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the diff-coverage policy + PR comment + dashboard payload. The validator script enforces required keys and per-field constraints; forbidden patterns enumerate shapes the agent must never emit.

example.note: default_threshold = 0 disables the gate; override missing required `reason`; headline_metric not in enum; pr_comment.per_file missing; dashboard block missing.

list.pattern: pr_comment.headline_metric uses whole-repo coverage instead of diff coverage.
policy.overrides[] entry missing `reason` OR reason shorter than 10 characters.
PR comment reports only an aggregated number with no per-file breakdown.
merge_gate_verdict = pass while any per_file row has gate_pass = false.
